title: Crystal Odyssey
description: Use various gems to create tools that will help you survive!
body:
# Crystal Odyssey: Magical Gems and Tools

**Crystal Odyssey** is a Minecraft mod that introduces a variety of **magical gems**, new crafting mechanics, and unique tools to enhance your gameplay. Explore a world filled with rare gemstones, craft powerful tools, and unlock magical abilities to aid your adventures

***

## 🪄 Features

### Magical Gems

Discover and craft unique **magical gems**, each offering special crafting and enchanting opportunities:

*   **Sapphire:** Found in the Overworld and enhances water-related enchantments and tools.
*   **Ruby:** Mined deep underground and powers fire-related items and enchantments.
*   **Glowstone Gem:** A crafted gem created by smelting glowstone, used for light-related tools and lanterns.

### Enchanted Tools and Items

Use the Mana Anvil and Mana Injector to craft enchanted books and magical tools, such as:

*   **Glowstone Gem Lantern:** Grants lantern vision and adjustable brightness based on its level.
*   **Light Staff:** Places light orb blocks to illuminate your path.
*   **Wand of El Dorado:** Detects nearby ores within a configurable radius.
*   **Infinite Buckets:** Craft specialized **Sapphire Buckets** and **Ruby Buckets** that hold large quantities of water or lava. Upgrade them to infinite versions for unlimited usage!

## 🏔 Ore Generation

*   **Sapphire:** Spawns above Y=0, most commonly at Y=46.
*   **Ruby:** Found below Y=0, concentrated between Y=-64 and Y=-48.
*   **Glowstone Gem:** Crafted by smelting glowstone in a furnace.

## 🔨 How to Craft

*   Mine **Sapphire** and **Ruby** ores from the Overworld.
*   Craft **Glowstone Gems** by smelting glowstone.
*   Use the **Mana Anvil** to imbue items with the power of gems.
*   Unlock high-level enchantments tailored to your needs, including **Efficiency V**, **Fortune III**, and more.
*   [see detail in doc](https://github.com/reasure3/CrystalOdyssey-Neoforge/blob/master/doc/en/recipe/Recipe.md)

## 🔧 Compatibility
*   Fully supports **[Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios)**, allowing you to equip magical tools in specialized slots.
*   Compatible with **[JEI (Just Enough Items)](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/jei)** for recipe viewing and crafting guidance. (needs [19.21.0.247](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/jei/version/TxS03dKM) or higher)
*   Works seamlessly with **[Jade](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/jade)**, providing in-game information about blocks and items.
*   Integrates well with other popular mods and modpacks.

## 📚 Additional Information

For more detailed information about the mod, check out the official wiki:

*   [English Wiki](https://github.com/reasure3/CrystalOdyssey-Neoforge/blob/master/doc/en/Main.md)
*   [한국어 위키](https://github.com/reasure3/CrystalOdyssey-Neoforge/blob/master/doc/ko/Main.md)

## 📦 Upcoming Features

*   New gems and tools
*   Gem-based enhancements for weapons and arm

## ⚙️ Requirements

*   **[Kotlin For Forge](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/kotlin-for-forge)** is required to run this mod. Ensure it is installed to avoid any compatibility issues.

***

Unleash the magic of Crystal Odyssey and transform your Minecraft world into a realm of enchanted possibilities. Whether you're a builder, miner, or adventurer, this mod offers something for everyone. Download now and start your journey!
